title: Ravensburger Ballet Bakery 100 Piece Jigsaw Puzzle for Kids Age 6 Years Up - Girls Gifts
seller_info_text: Sold by MagnaDepot and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: BALLERINA TOYS - Your young dancer is sure to twirl with delight over these budding ballerinas! This adorable “Ballet Bakery” puzzle features a trio of dancers in their cute tutus as they gaze longingly at a window full of ballet-themed delectable treats.
PLAYFUL DEVELOPMENT - Perfect toys for your child. Puzzles for kids of every age help support a child’s development as they play, building skills such as concentration and creativity.

REMIUM QUALITY - Ravensburger puzzles use an exclusive, extra-thick cardboard combined with fine linen structured paper to create a glare-free puzzle image and give you the best experience possible. Our 100 piece kids puzzles with XXL large pieces are crafted with premium quality materials and measure 49 x 36cm when complete. Fully complies with all necessary UK and EU testing standards
BESTSELLING PUZZLE BRAND WORLDWIDE - With over 1 billion puzzles sold, Ravensburger make a great birthday gift or Christmas present for boys, girls and kids of all ages.
FSC CERTIFIED - This product is made of FSC-certified and other controlled material. By choosing this product, you are supporting responsible management of the world’s forests.
description: From the manufacturer Premium Puzzle - Perfect Age Fit Ravensburger develop puzzles just how children love them: age-appropriate in motif, number of pieces and size. Excellent build quality with materials sourced from sustainable forests. Educational and fun to learn. Ravensburger Jigsaw Puzzles for Children For over 130 years, Ravensburger have been the term for puzzles. Ravensburger quality is characterised by the selection of motifs. Using hand-drawn punching templates & hand-crafted precision to ensure the greatest possible fit and variety of shapes of the puzzle pieces. Feel the Ravensburger passion for quality and discover how one fits each other.
